The warriors of the Unblinking Eye moved
together as one, shoulder to shoulder.

A window onto a realm of red,
where countless voices scream...

When the throat roars,
As eyes weep,
When the hand grips hard
With trembling fingers,
When belly twists
Yet legs stand strong,
That is the work
Of the Defiant Heart.

metadata.name: Crown of Eyes
explicit_mods: Increases and Reductions to Spell damage also apply to Attacks
metadata.flavor_text:
Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.

metadata.name: Dreadfist
metadata.flavor_text: What is worse, the sting of the past, the pain of the present, or the fear of the future?

metadata.name: Dunkelhalt
explicit_mods: You take (50-50)% of damage from Blocked Hits
metadata.flavor_text:
"A thief in the night, Draven did creep,
families asleep, taken, held on high.
Clever, he thought, 'til his children paid.
Nay, villain, a man never bleeds alone."

metadata.name: Effigy of Cruelty
explicit_mods: Critical Hits with Spells apply (1-3) Stack of Critical Weakness
metadata.flavor_text:
The horrors we imagined as children
still exist somewhere in the dark...

metadata.name: Empire's Grasp
metadata.flavor_text:
"I like my vassals at sword point,
but my enemies as close as the hilt."
- Emperor Chitus

metadata.name: Gloamgown
explicit_mods: Your base Energy Shield Recharge Delay is (10-10) seconds

metadata.name: Nocturne
explicit_mods: Parried enemies take more Spell Damage instead of more Attack Damage
metadata.flavor_text:
Light and shadow chase eternal,
but neither knows the other exists...

metadata.name: Rearguard

"It's a rare man that has eyes in the back of his head."

"Resist for long enough, and your oppressor
will lose his will. Then, you've won."

- Shavronne of Umbra

Hallowed Dordalus was cast into the pit as a heretic,
but his piety was so great, he would not burn.
He rose again, lauded, his faith forever changed...
but not the way the Templar believed.

metadata.name: Silverthorne
explicit_mods: Parrying applies (10-10) Stacks of Critical Weakness

As a boy, in the arena, Daresso learned to
feign weakness to open up a lethal blow.

Unlike the other gods, when he was born from the volcano,

metadata.name: Atalui's Bloodletting
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports any Skill, turning a portion of its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve Spirit. Supported Skills Gain a portion of their Life cost as extra Physical Damage.

metadata.name: Einhar's Beastrite
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Melee Strike skills, causing them to steal a Modifier from Rare monsters they kill for a lengthy duration, while being unable to damage enemies not on low Life. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

metadata.name: Brutus' Brain
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports skills which create Minions, causing those Minions to be unable to deal or take Damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

metadata.name: Uruk's Smelting
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger. Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills permanently increases the Physical Damage taken by those affected, up to a cap.

metadata.name: Paquate's Pact
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Warcries, causing them to inflict massive amounts of Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect, at the cost of your Life.

metadata.name: Vilenta's Propulsion
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Spell Skills that fire Projectiles, causing increases and reductions to cast speed to also apply to Projectile speed.

metadata.name: Ailith's Chimes
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which can expend Combo. On expending Combo with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain Power Charges based on the amount of Combo expended.

metadata.name: Tecrod's Revenge
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a duration or when they take further damage exceeding their maximum Life. Minions from Supported Skills gain Soul Eater and a burst of speed on entering this state.

metadata.name: Doedre's Undoing
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create Hazardous areas which explode when Enemies enter them, Cursing Enemies and dealing Chaos Damage.

metadata.name: Ratha's Assault
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load multiple extra bolts and attack faster. Supported Skills cannot reload normally, instead loading bolts when you Dodge.

metadata.name: Arjun's Medal
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Crossbow Skills, causing them to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on kill.

metadata.name: Kaom's Madness
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create many additional fissures at the cost of damage, speed, and area of effect.

metadata.name: Sione's Temper
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have an increasingly higher chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle, resetting when they do.

metadata.name: Ixchel's Torment
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which Trigger other Skills. Skills Triggered by Supported Skills have their Damage, Area of Effect, and Projectile Speed randomly raised or lowered when Triggered, as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when Triggered.

metadata.name: Romira's Requital
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life. A percentage of Damage taken this way is Recouped by you as Life.

metadata.name: Tawhoa's Tending
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life. Totems created by Supported Skills explode on death, dealing Physical damage based on their Life.

metadata.name: Dialla's Desire
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and Quality, while reducing the cost and Reservation.

metadata.name: Kalisa's Crescendo
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Curse Skills. Enemies Cursed by Supported Skills are Pacified for the final portion of the Supported Curse's duration.

metadata.name: Kulemak's Dominion
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.

metadata.name: Xoph's Pyre
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Ignites.

metadata.name: Esh's Radiance
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Shock.

metadata.name: Tul's Stillness
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.

metadata.name: Uul-Netol's Embrace
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Break Armour.

metadata.name: Rakiata's Flow
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, causing those Hits to treat Enemy Elemental Resistances as inverted.

metadata.name: Garukhan's Resolve
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills have a maximum Critical Hit chance, but will Bifurcate Critical Hit Chance. Cannot support Skills which have a Cooldown or that are Triggered, and does not modify skills used by Minions.

metadata.name: Tacati's Ire
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Poison inflicted with Supported Skills deals Damage faster the higher your Rage.

metadata.name: Rigwald's Ferocity
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Attack skills, granting them Attack Speed at the cost of Damage or Damage at the cost of Attack Speed depending on Weapon Set they are used in. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

metadata.name: Uhtred's Exodus
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided no other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

metadata.name: Uhtred's Omen
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided exactly one other support is used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

metadata.name: Uhtred's Augury
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided exactly two other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

metadata.name: Daresso's Passion
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Banner Skills, causing them to require significantly less Glory to use.

metadata.name: Ahn's Citadel

metadata.name: Atziri's Allure
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.

Supported Spells echo thrice, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay, but Supported Skills are given a short Cooldown. Cannot support Channelling skills, Remote skills, skills which already have a Cooldown, or skills which are Triggered.

metadata.name: Arbiter's Ignition

metadata.name: Arakaali's Lust
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.

metadata.name: Grip of Kulemak
explicit_mods: Gain (8-12)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Debuffs you inflict have (12-20)% increased Slow Magnitude
metadata.flavor_text:
Drink deeply of the Well.
Let the Abyss coil within.

metadata.name: Shankgonne
explicit_mods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (20-20)% of Armour
metadata.flavor_text:
"Captain Hiff Greybeard accomplished what nary a Brinerot
could: he died of old age. Almost had him a dozen times
meself, if it weren't for that damn leg of his... crafty shite..."

4714.text: Blood of the Warrior Gargantuan Life Flask

metadata.name: Blood of the Warrior
explicit_mods: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled
25% of Damage taken during effect Recouped as Life
Gain 4 Rage when Hit by an Enemy during effect
No Inherent loss of Rage during effect
metadata.flavor_text:
"Tukohama may be asleep, but he still gives us his strength. A small
needle, an offering, and a vial... drink deeply, my son, and you
will more than survive the coming battle... you will thrive."
metadata.description: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refill at [Wells|Wells] or by killing monsters.

4714.name: Blood of the Warrior

metadata.name: Double Vision
explicit_mods:
When you reload, triggers Gemini Surge to alternately
gain (2-6) Cold Surges or 5 Fire Surges
metadata.flavor_text:
For those without a home in the Vastiri, the
hot day is harsh, but the chill night is far worse.

metadata.name: Fairgraves' Curse
explicit_mods: Attack Hits inflict Spectral Fire for (8-8) seconds
metadata.flavor_text:
The power of the Allflame rends
souls just as easily as flesh.

metadata.name: Umbilicus Immortalis
explicit_mods: Your Life Flask also applies to your Minions
Minions cannot Die while affected by a Life Flask
metadata.flavor_text:
"The power of rebirth rivals that of immortality."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 3

metadata.name: Kaltenhalt
explicit_mods: Modifiers to Stun Buildup apply to Freeze Buildup instead for Parry
(100-100)% of Parry Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
metadata.flavor_text: Cold, miserable and alone... but alive.

metadata.name: Lightning Coil
explicit_mods: (30-50)% of Physical damage from Hits taken as Lightning damage
metadata.flavor_text:
The world churned during the Great Wasting.
Tawhoa may have stilled the rioting earth,
but it was Valako that tamed the broken sky.

metadata.name: Heart of the Well
metadata.flavor_text:
Countless souls scream in agonising harmony,
forever sinking under the weight of the newly dead.
metadata.description: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

metadata.name: Hinekora's Sight
metadata.flavor_text: Remember the past, anticipate the future.

metadata.name: Cospri's Will
explicit_mods: Curses you inflict have infinite Duration
Curses you inflict can affect Hexproof Enemies
Withered you inflict has infinite Duration
metadata.flavor_text:
Curse their vile Council,
They cast me aside as if I am some bastard child.
If they only knew the power I possess.

metadata.name: Thunderfist
explicit_mods: Adds (77-111) to 106 Lightning Damage to Unarmed Melee Hits
+(0.1-1.1).66% to Unarmed Melee Attack Critical Hit Chance
metadata.flavor_text:
The roar of the heavens
Strikes more than fear
Into the hearts of Man

metadata.name: Marohi Erqi
explicit_mods: Heavy Stuns Enemies that are on Full Life
metadata.flavor_text:
"Drunken Erqi boasted to Tukohama; the God of War
challenged him to a clash of strength. Woe to the
Divine - he should have made it a test of skill!"

metadata.name: The Unborn Lich
metadata.flavor_text:
In ghastly pits beneath the world,
Kulemak grows countless new bodies,
each more powerful than the last.
Not all of his abominations survive.

metadata.name: Darkness Enthroned
explicit_mods: This item gains bonuses from Socketed Items as though it was Gloves
metadata.flavor_text:
Kulemak sat triumphant, raising the crown.
Darkness coiled the world in eternal night.
Victory, a mere moment, came crashing down.
No conqueror, no conquered, only searing Light.

metadata.description: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

metadata.name: Azmeri Reliquary Key
metadata.description: Open a Reliquary portal by using this item at The Reliquary Vault. Can only be used once.

metadata.name: Amor Mandragora
explicit_mods: Enemies in your Presence are Hindered
Gain (20-20) Druidic Prowess for every 20 total Rage spent
metadata.flavor_text:
A sensitive few among the first settlers of Ezomyr
followed the wisps by canoe. On a misty forested
island, Cirel of Tarth stood waiting to greet them.

metadata.name: Hysseg's Claw
metadata.flavor_text:
In a time of great need, surrounded by Abyssals,
the Wayward Druid came to the Sun Clan's aid.
It is a debt they have never forgotten.

metadata.name: Architect's Orb
metadata.description: Right click this item then left click on a corrupted item to apply it.
effect: Modifies a Corrupted Equipment or Jewel item unpredictably or destroys it

metadata.name: Crystallised Corruption
metadata.description: Right click this item then left click on a corrupted gem to apply it.
effect: Modifies a Corrupted Skill Gem unpredictably or destroys it

metadata.name: Core Destabiliser
metadata.description: Right click this item then left click on a soul core to apply it.
effect: Modifies a Soul Core unpredictably, with a chance to destroy it

metadata.name: Ancient Infuser
metadata.description: Right click this item then left click on a precursor tablet to apply it.
effect: Modifies a Precursor Tablet unpredictably, with a chance to destroy it

metadata.name: Vaal Cultivation Orb
metadata.description: Right click this item then left click on a unique item to apply it.
effect:
Replaces up to 2 modifiers on a Corrupted Vaal Unique
Replaces other Uniques with a Corrupted Unique of the same Item Class

metadata.name: Vaal Infuser
metadata.description: Right click this item then left click on an item to apply it.
effect:
Improves the quality of a Martial Weapon, Caster Weapon or Armour
above 20% with a chance of Corrupting it

metadata.name: Orb of Extraction
metadata.description: Right click this item then left click on an item containing socketed Augments to apply it.
effect: Destroys an Equipment item, returning any Augments socketed in it

metadata.name: Vaal Siphoner
metadata.description: Right click this item then left click on a corrupted rare jewellery item to apply it.
effect:
Adds a kill threshold to a Corrupted Rare Jewellery item, when threshold is met
Siphons a random modifier and improves the numeric values of other modifiers

metadata.name: Guatelitzi's Thesis
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in an Armour to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: Gain Armour equal to 25% of Life Lost from Hits in the past 8 seconds
Body Armours: 10% of Physical Damage prevented Recouped as Life
Boots:
Lose 5% of maximum Life per second while Sprinting
25% increased Movement Speed while Sprinting

metadata.name: Citaqualotl's Thesis
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in an Armour to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Body Armours: You Recoup 50% of Damage taken by your Offerings as Life
Gloves: One of your Persistent Minions revives when an Offering expires
Boots: Sacrifice 10% of maximum Life to gain that much Guard when you Dodge Roll

metadata.name: Jiquani's Thesis
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in an Armour to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: +1 to maximum Mana per 2 Item Energy Shield on Equipped Helmet

Gloves: Energy Shield Recharge starts after spending a total of
 2000 Mana, no more than once every 2 seconds

Boots: Increases and Reductions to Movement Speed also
 apply to Energy Shield Recharge Rate

metadata.name: Quipolatl's Thesis
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in an Armour to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: A random Skill that requires Glory generates 15% of its maximum Glory when your Mark Activates
Gloves: Each Runic Inscription from your Curse Skills causes you to Regenerate Mana per second equal to 10% of that Skill's Mana Cost
Body Armours: +50% of Armour also applies to Chaos Damage while on full Energy Shield

metadata.name: Bear Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Helmet or Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: 8% increased Area of Effect
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence deal 12 to 18 added Attack Physical Damage

metadata.name: Primate Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Helmet or Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: Minions have 12% increased maximum Life
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence deal 30% increased Damage

metadata.name: Stag Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Helmet or Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: 50% increased Thorns Critical Hit Chance
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence deal 1 to 40 added Attack Lightning Damage

metadata.name: Boar Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in Gloves or a Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Gloves: Gain 1 Rage on Melee Hit
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence Regenerate 8 Life per second

metadata.name: Snake Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in Gloves or a Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Gloves: 5% increased Curse Magnitudes
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence have 8% increased Attack Speed

metadata.name: Wolf Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in Gloves or a Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Gloves: 10% increased Magnitude of Bleeding you inflict
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence have 14% increased Critical Damage Bonus

metadata.name: Cat Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in Gloves or a Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Gloves: 15% increased Accuracy Rating
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence have 14% increased Critical Hit Chance

metadata.name: Owl Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Focus or a Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Foci: 10% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence have 8% increased Cast Speed

metadata.name: Ox Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Shield or a Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Shields: 10% increased Block chance
Sceptres: Allies in your Presence have +8% to all Elemental Resistances

metadata.name: Fox Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Body Armour or Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Body Armours: +2% to Quality of all Skills
Sceptres: 30% increased Presence Area of Effect

metadata.name: Rabbit Idol
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Body Armour or Sceptre to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Body Armours: 5% increased Rarity of Items found
Sceptres: 10% increased Spirit

metadata.name: Idol of Sirrius
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a pair of Gloves to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Gloves: 8% increased Attack Speed

metadata.name: Idol of Thruldana
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Martial Weapon to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Martial Weapon:
25% reduced Poison Duration
Targets can be affected by +1 of your Poisons at the same time

metadata.name: Idol of Grold
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a pair of Gloves to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Gloves: 20% increased total Power counted by Warcries

metadata.name: Idol of Eeshta
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Helmet to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: 12% increased Cost Efficiency

metadata.name: Idol of Egrin
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Helmet to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: Enemies you Curse take 6% increased Damage

metadata.name: Idol of Maxarius
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Body Armour to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Body Armours: +1 Charm Slot

metadata.name: Idol of Ralakesh
metadata.description: Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Helmet to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items.
effect: Helmets: 8% increased Reservation Efficiency of Minion Skills

metadata.name: Lavianga's Spirits
explicit_mods: This Flask cannot be Used but applies its Effect constantly
metadata.flavor_text:
"How do I cope with what I witnessed on Wraeclast?
Thank the Ancestors! My cup, it overflows."
- Lavianga, former advisor to Kaom
metadata.description: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refill at [Wells|Wells] or by killing monsters.

metadata.name: Unforeseen Consequences
implicit_mods:
Adds Abysses to a Map 
(1-1) use remaining
explicit_mods: 5 additional Rare Monsters are spawned from Abysses in Map
Map is overrun by the Abyssal
metadata.flavor_text:
The Well was naught.
The Precursors dug too deep.
The Well always had been.
metadata.description: Can be used in a personal Map Device to add modifiers to a Map.

5327.text: Fury of the King Ashbark Talisman

metadata.name: Fury of the King
explicit_mods: Bear Skills Convert (80-80)% of Physical Damage to Fire Damage
Skills which require Glory generate (2-5) Glory every 2 seconds
Enemies in your Presence have Exposure
metadata.flavor_text:
Gruthkul was the Mother of Despair...
but one day, the Father will return,
and discover the fate of his children.

5327.name: Fury of the King

metadata.name: The Flesh Poppet
explicit_mods:
Copy a random Modifier from each enemy in your Presence when
you Shapeshift to an Animal form
Modifiers gained this way are lost after (30-30) seconds or when you next Shapeshift
metadata.flavor_text:
Long ago, the witches of the Azak Tribe learned
how to tap into the flow of Vivid lifeforce to
'cooperate' with their enemies... forcefully.

metadata.name: Atziri's Step
explicit_mods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (40-60)% of Evasion Rating
(-12--6)% to amount of Damage Prevented by Deflection
Cannot be Light Stunned by Deflected Hits
metadata.flavor_text:
"Those who dance are considered insane
by those who cannot hear the music."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

metadata.name: Atziri's Contempt
explicit_mods: Spear Skills inflict a Bloodstone Lance on Hit, up to a maximum of 30 on each target
metadata.flavor_text:
"My people? I'm not doing this for them.
They belong to me. They want this for me.
Their sacrifice is a gift they give out of love
and adoration... I deserve it. I am their Queen."

metadata.name: Atziri's Splendour
implicit_mods: +(1-1) to Level of all Corrupted Skill Gems
explicit_mods: Only Soul Cores can be Socketed in this item
This item gains bonuses from Socketed Soul Cores as though it was also a Shield
(80-120)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
Skills from Corrupted Gems have (50-50)% of Mana Costs Converted to Life Costs
metadata.flavor_text:
"When you have nothing to hide,
you have nothing to fear."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

metadata.name: Drillneck
explicit_mods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (24-32)% of Evasion Rating
Attack Projectiles Return if they Pierced at least (2-4) times
Projectiles deal (42-64)% increased Damage with Hits for each time they have Pierced
Projectiles have (42-64)% increased Critical Hit chance for each time they have Pierced
metadata.flavor_text:
"Why waste such a fine arrow on just one man?"
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer
metadata.description: Can only be equipped if you are wielding a Bow.

metadata.name: Flesh Crucible
metadata.flavor_text:
"Never mind the pain, it's only... making room. Unrelated fact,
a person can live a normal life with just one kidney. Or just one
lung. You never know what Vaal technology will cost you..."
metadata.description: Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

metadata.name: Atziri's Rule
explicit_mods: +(3-5) to Level of all Corrupted Spell Skill Gems
Spells which cost Life Gain (80-120)% of Damage as Extra Physical Damage
metadata.flavor_text: Bow before her... or suffer the most gruelling death imaginable.

metadata.name: Dominus' Grasp
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain more times.

metadata.name: Amanamu's Tithe
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Persistent Minion Skills, granting a chance when Supported Minions die for you to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier.

metadata.name: Tasalio's Rhythm
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which have a benefit for Perfectly Timing their use. On successfully executing Perfect Timing with Supported Skills, gain Tasalio's Rhythm. Tasalio's Rhythm causes Supported Skills to deal more damage and have shorter Perfect Timing windows for each stack. Failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Tasalio's Rhythm) will remove all Tasalio's Rhythm on you.

metadata.name: Khatal's Rejuvenation
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills that generate Remnants. Picking up Remnants from Supported Skills grants Khatal's Rejuvenation.

metadata.name: Bhatair's Vengeance
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with Supported Skills infuses you and your allies with Cold damage for a short time.

metadata.name: Hayoxi's Fulmination
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create areas which Curse enemies so long as they are within them. Cursed areas from Supported Skills gather power before erupting in a column of annihilating light after a moderate delay.

metadata.name: Xibaqua's Rending
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing Corpses in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.

metadata.name: Guatelitzi's Ablation
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills Sacrifice a portion of your life on use. While Offering spikes from Supported Skills persist, you are periodically granted a Power Charge. When spikes from Supported Skills die, Regenerate a percentage of your maximum Life and Mana per second based on the duration the Offering persisted.

metadata.name: Atziri's Impatience
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills with Cooldowns, dramatically increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover, but causing you to lose Life, Mana, and Energy Shield when they are used. Cannot Support Meta Skills or modify the Skills of Minions.

metadata.name: Zerphi's Infamy
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect:
Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Supported Skills gain a Glory requirement, and build Glory when you spend Life on Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage and have significantly
 increased area of effect.

metadata.name: Zarokh's Revolt
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Spells you cast yourself, making their effect reoccur up to five times when cast, but giving them a moderate Cooldown. Cannot support Channelling Skills.

metadata.name: Oisín's Oath
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which Hit enemies, causing their Mana Leech to recover based on Elemental damage instead of Physical damage.

metadata.name: Cirel's Cultivation
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing you from having more than one of that Totem but granting significant benefits for Supported Totems based how many allied Totems are near them. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

metadata.name: Morgana's Tempest
metadata.description: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
effect: Supports Spells which create Storms, increasing their Limit and causing them to move from the player towards the target location faster, but become less effective. Cannot Support Triggered Skills.
